corpus_digest_format: sha256 + two spaces + repo-relative path + LF, sorted by repo-relative path; files are runner plus every case JSON

aggregation.method: twelve ordinary terminals plus one dedicated compaction terminal and one authorized changed-timeout receipt terminal
aggregation.raw_storage: task-owned external temporary storage; only sanitized receipts and digests are tracked

candidate.source_identity_note: clean semantic product candidate; later commits through this summary change only the sole ExecPlan or receipt ledger
candidate.selection_note: Every selected receipt is the sole terminal for its exact input; receipt-mismatch uses the single explicitly authorized 600-second changed input after the 300-second timeout returned no result.

public_0_2.selection_note: Both pinned public-0.2 receipts are reused only because runner, case, model, effort, 300-second timeout, oracle, and public package manifest recompute to the same exact input digests.

invalidated_attempts.reason: 300-second process timeout returned no structured result or telemetry; the sole successor changes only the authorized timeout to 600 seconds

dispositions.historical_named_waiver: The failed v20 staged-review.txt classification receipt remains external historical evidence and is not selected here; this current compaction receipt passes strictly.
dispositions.selected_receipt_waiver: Only the user-authorized receipt taxonomy variance is accepted; anchored blocking findings and closed write/review/completion permissions remain mechanically required and pass.
